IntelliDealer Menus > Financial Management > Accounts Receivable > Customer Profile: Listing
Management Central > CRM > Customer Profile
purpose: search for a customer profile and open it for edit. See Searching for Customer Profiles
or add a new Customer Profile
1. Enter your search criteria in the appropriate fields. See Screen Description
The Customer Profiles that meet the search criteria are shown. If only one profile entry is found, the
system automatically opens the screen displaying the corresponding profile
3. Locate the desired customer from the results and click on it to open the Customer Profile
If Search Extended Fields is selected and you enter a Customer Name then executing a search also scans:
the Customer Profile: Contacts tab for a matching firstName or lastName
the Customer Profile: Ship To tab for a matching name

fields.name: Search 1 or 2
fields.description: Search for a customer by entering either search word 1 or 2.

fields.description: Search for a customer by entering a phone number.

fields.name: Status
fields.description: Search for a customer by selecting a specific customer status from the drop down list. For example: All, Active, Deleted or prospect customer status.

fields.name: Invoice
fields.description: The status of the equipment invoice Status Pending—the invoice is not yet been processed.

fields.name: VESign
fields.description: The signing status of the VESign document. Can be one of: Status Awaiting Signature—all signatures are pending. Partially Signed—more than one signature is pending. Signed—all required signatures are complete. Canceled—signing has been canceled. If no status is present, then the document has not been sent for electronic signing. IntelliDealer checks for a status update every 30 minutes.

fields.name: WIP Method
fields.description: Select which method to use to analyze the WIP data. WIP Balancing—lists outstanding work orders by the dollar amount that was posted to the general ledger. When WIP Balancing is selected, the system calculates the current work in process based on the WIP code (S or I) that is on the actual record in the SALDET or WOLAB files. List Price—lists outstanding work orders by list price. When List Price
